context: Tests whether the agent implements bundle pricing logic correctly, covering all four pricing types, proper savings calculations, and server-side price calculation patterns.

checklist.name: sum pricing type
checklist.description: Implements 'sum' pricing type that returns the total of all component prices as the bundle price

checklist.name: fixed pricing type
checklist.description: Implements 'fixed' pricing type that returns a fixed dollar amount regardless of component prices

checklist.name: discount_pct pricing type
checklist.description: Implements 'discount_pct' pricing type that applies a percentage discount to the component sum (e.g. sumPrice * (1 - value/100))

checklist.name: discount_abs pricing type
checklist.description: Implements 'discount_abs' pricing type that subtracts a fixed amount from the component sum, floored at 0

checklist.name: componentSum returned
checklist.description: The function returns a 'componentSum' (or equivalent) representing the total of all individual component prices

checklist.name: savings returned
checklist.description: The function returns 'savings' (or equivalent) as the difference between componentSum and bundlePrice

checklist.name: savingsPct returned
checklist.description: The function returns 'savingsPct' (or equivalent) as the percentage of savings relative to componentSum, rounded to an integer

checklist.name: current prices fetched
checklist.description: Prices are fetched from a data source (DB, API, or input data) rather than using client-submitted or hardcoded prices

checklist.name: toFixed precision
checklist.description: Bundle price for discount_pct and discount_abs uses toFixed(2) or equivalent rounding to 2 decimal places

checklist.name: price per variant and quantity
checklist.description: Component sum accounts for quantity (price * quantity per component), not just unit price

checklist.name: tests cover all pricing types
checklist.description: Test cases (or demo inputs) exercise all four pricing_type values (sum, fixed, discount_pct, discount_abs)

checklist.name: no client price trust
checklist.description: Pricing function does NOT accept a pre-calculated price as a direct input — it computes price from component data
